channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PFL] Popular Foundations Ltd: Resignation of Independent Director, Appointment of New Director and CFO
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Popular Foundations Ltd has announced the resignation of Independent Director Mr. D H Gopalakrishnan due to personal reasons. The company has also appointed Ms. Umaa Sharvani as an Additional Director (Independent) for a term of five years and Mr. N Chellappa as the Chief Financial Officer. The Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee have been re-constituted consequent to these changes.

  • Resignation of Independent Director Mr. D H Gopalakrishnan.
  • Appointment of Ms. Umaa Sharvani as an Additional Director (Independent).
  • Appointment of Mr. N Chellappa as the Chief Financial Officer.
  • Re-constitution of the Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Popular Foundations Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CAPRIHANS] Caprihans India Limited Receives Disclosure of Form C from Promoter Bilcare Limited
item.description:
Caprihans India Limited has received a disclosure in Form C from its promoter Bilcare Limited, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. Bilcare Limited has acquired 3,00,000 equity shares on 20th March 2026 and 3,30,000 equity shares on 23rd March 2026, pursuant to the conversion of warrants into equity shares. The total shareholding of Bilcare Limited in Caprihans India Limited has increased to 55.99%.

  • Bilcare Limited has acquired 3,00,000 equity shares on 20th March 2026 and 3,30,000 equity shares on 23rd March 2026.
  • The acquisition is pursuant to the conversion of warrants into equity shares.
  • The total shareholding of Bilcare Limited in Caprihans India Limited has increased to 55.99%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAPRIHANS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GEPIL] GE Power India Ltd Updates Key Managerial Personnel Contact Details
item.description:
GE Power India Ltd has updated the contact details of its Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The updated details, effective from 03 April 2026, include Mr. Puneet Bhatla, Managing Director, and Mr. Aashish Ghai, Whole-time Director & CFO. These changes are for the purpose of determining materiality of an event or information and for making disclosures to stock exchange(s) under the aforementioned Regulations.

  • GE Power India Ltd updates contact details of Key Managerial Personnel
  • Changes effective from 03 April 2026
  • Details include Managing Director Mr. Puneet Bhatla and Whole-time Director & CFO Mr. Aashish Ghai
  • Updates made in compliance with SEBI Regulations
  • Changes to aid in determining materiality of events and information, and making disclosures to stock exchanges

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GE Power India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PFL] Popular Foundations Ltd: Independent Director Resigns, New Director and CFO Appointed
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Popular Foundations Ltd announced the outcomes of its board meeting held on 23.03.2026. The meeting was marked by the resignation of Independent Director Mr. D H Gopalakrishnan due to personal reasons. The board approved his resignation and thanked him for his contributions. The board also appointed Ms. Umaa Sharvani as an Additional Director (Independent) for a term of five years. Furthermore, Mr. N Chellappa was appointed as the Chief Financial Officer of the company. The board also re-constituted the Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee consequent to the resignation of Mr. Gopalakrishnan and appointment of Ms. Sharvani.

  • Resignation of Independent Director Mr. D H Gopalakrishnan
  • Appointment of Ms. Umaa Sharvani as Additional Director (Independent)
  • Appointment of Mr. N Chellappa as Chief Financial Officer
  • Re-constitution of Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Popular Foundations Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NITCO] Nitco Ltd Allots Equity Shares Following Share Warrants Exercise
item.description:
Nitco Ltd has allotted equity shares to a promoter, Mr. Vivek Prannath Talwar, following the exercise of share warrants. The allotment was approved by the company's board of directors at their meeting held on March 23, 2026. The company had issued and allotted 2,34,10,000 nos. of convertible warrants to the promoter on January 27, 2025. The allotment of 1,14,00,000 (One Crore Fourteen Lakhs) number of equity shares was made at a premium of Rs. 82.25/- per share against the conversion of 1,14,00,000 convertible warrants. The allotment is in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Nitco Ltd has allotted equity shares to a promoter following the exercise of share warrants.
  • The allotment was approved by the company's board of directors at their meeting held on March 23, 2026.
  • The company had issued and allotted 2,34,10,000 nos. of convertible warrants to the promoter on January 27, 2025.
  • The allotment of 1,14,00,000 (One Crore Fourteen Lakhs) number of equity shares was made at a premium of Rs. 82.25/- per share.
  • The allotment is in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NITCO LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GEPIL] GE Power India Ltd Closes Trading Window Till 48 Hours After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
GE Power India Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company. The closure will be in effect from 01 April 2026 till 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter and year ending on 31 March 2026 are made public. This move is in compliance with the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading in the Securities of the Company by Designated Persons.

  • Trading window for GE Power India Ltd securities to remain closed from 01 April 2026
  • Closure due to compliance with the company's Code of Conduct
  • Closure to last till 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 results are made public
  • Date of Board meeting to consider and approve results yet to be communicated
  • Move aims to regulate and report trading in the company's securities by designated persons

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GE Power India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IRB] IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd Announces 1:1 Bonus Issue
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd has announced a bonus equity issue in the proportion of 1:1, meaning one new equity share of Re.1/- each for every one existing equity share of Re.1/- each fully paid up. The record date for determining the shareholders eligible for issuance and allotment of Bonus equity shares is fixed as Wednesday, April 1, 2026. The deemed date of allotment of the bonus equity shares is the next working day, i.e. Thursday, April 2, 2026. The said Bonus equity shares will be made available for trading on the next working date from the deemed date of allotment.

  • IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd announces a 1:1 bonus issue
  • The record date for determining the shareholders eligible for issuance and allotment of Bonus equity shares is fixed as April 1, 2026
  • The deemed date of allotment of the bonus equity shares is April 2, 2026
  • The Bonus equity shares will be made available for trading on the next working date from the deemed date of allotment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRB INFRASTRUCTURE DEVELOPERS LTD. | Category: Bonus

item.title: [KPITTECH] KPIT Technologies Transfers 26% Stake in Subsidiary N-Dream to KPIT UK
item.description:
KPIT Technologies Ltd has completed the transfer of its 26% stake in N-Dream, a Cloud based Game Aggregation Platform company, to KPIT Technologies (UK) Limited. This move aims to achieve parity and restructure within the KPIT group’s organizational structure. Post-transfer, KPIT UK holds a 90% stake in N Dream, making it a step-down subsidiary of KPIT India. This strategic investment is part of KPIT’s roadmap to enable Automotive OEMs enhance the driver & passenger experience in the Cockpit of the Future. KPIT will offer complementary software integration & validation services to N-Dream’s Automotive clients, and both parties will collaborate towards offering value-added data products for Automotive OEMs.

  • KPIT Technologies transfers 26% stake in subsidiary N-Dream to KPIT UK
  • N-Dream becomes a step-down subsidiary of KPIT India
  • Transfer aims to achieve parity and restructure within the KPIT group’s organizational structure
  • KPIT to offer complementary software integration & validation services to N-Dream’s Automotive clients
  • Both parties to collaborate towards offering value-added data products for Automotive OEMs

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPIT Technologies Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [IRFC] IRFC delivers Rs 12,842 crore strategic refinancing for HURL, advancing whole-of-government financing vision
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited (IRFC) has signed a major Rupee Term Loan agreement with Hindustan Urvarak and Rasayan Limited (HURL) for the refinancing of its existing long-term debt up to Rs 12,842 crore. This refinancing transaction with HURL reflects IRFC's whole-of-government approach, bringing cost-effective, long-term financing solutions to strategically important sectors such as fertilizers. The refinancing is expected to deliver substantial value to HURL through competitive financing terms and an optimised repayment structure. This will enhance financial flexibility, improve debt servicing efficiency, and free up resources for operational strengthening and future growth. The project has strong forward and backward linkages with the railway ecosystem.

  • IRFC signed a Rupee Term Loan agreement with HURL for refinancing existing long-term debt up to Rs 12,842 crore.
  • Refinancing transaction reflects IRFC's whole-of-government approach, supporting critical infrastructure sectors with strong linkages to railways.
  • Refinancing is expected to deliver substantial value to HURL through competitive financing terms and optimised repayment structure.
  • Project has strong forward and backward linkages with the railway ecosystem.
  • IRFC continues to maintain a strong asset quality record with a zero-NPA portfolio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd | Category: Refinancing

item.title: [SAMHI] Trading Window Closure for Samhi Hotels Ltd for FY2026 Audited Financial Results Declaration
item.description:
Samhi Hotels Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and specified connected persons. The closure is effective from 01 April 2026, the day after the quarter ends, until the expiry of two trading days after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31 March 2026. The board meeting date for the financial results declaration will be informed separately.

  • Trading window closure for Samhi Hotels Ltd
  • Closure effective from 01 April 2026
  • Applies to designated persons, their immediate relatives, and specified connected persons
  • Closure lasts until the expiry of two trading days after the audited financial results declaration
  • Board meeting date for financial results declaration to be informed separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samhi Hotels Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
